nasb.text: There is one body and one Spirit, just as also you were called in one hope of your calling;

esv.text: There is one body and one Spirit—just as you were called to the one hope that belongs to your call—

cnv.text: 身體只有一個，聖靈只有一位，就像你們蒙召只是藉著一個盼望。

ccb.text: 正如你们蒙召后有同一个盼望，你们同属一个身体，有同一位圣灵、

csbs.text: 一个身体、一位圣灵，就像你们蒙召时也被召入一个盼望，
